name: Mocha Swirl Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar with an electric mixer at high speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each egg is incorporated.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients: baking powder and flour.
4. Mix coffee and vanilla extract separately.
5. Alternately add the dry mix and coffee to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry mix.
6. Mix by hand using a spatula or wooden spoon; do not overbeat.
7. Remove one-third of the batter and mix it with melted chocolate.
8. Spread the remaining two-thirds of the batter in a greased and floured tube pan.
9. Place clumps of the chocolate batter on top of the other batter and swirl with a knife.
10. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
11. Cool for 10 minutes, then turn onto a plate.
12. Allow to cool completely.
